channel.title: Copilot CLI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Copilot CLI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Live notifications for Copilot CLI sessions
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now supports live coding agent notifications for remote Copilot CLI sessions. This lets users follow agent activity that starts outside the app.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: New C++ language server config skill for Copilot CLI
item.description:
The Microsoft C++ Language Server is now available as a Copilot Plugins marketplace plugin. It includes a built-in setup skill for Copilot CLI to automate project setup.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Secret scanning with GitHub MCP Server is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub secret scanning in the GitHub MCP server is now generally available. It can be used with MCP-compatible AI coding agents or IDEs, including GitHub Copilot CLI.

  • Source: GitHub
